---
title: "Publications"
bibliography: myrefs.bib
csl: vancouver-author-date.csl
---

Below is a list of publications from the research group. For the most up-to-date list, please visit my [Google Scholar Profile](https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=gBG-s8UAAAAJ&view_op=list_works&authuser=1&sortby=pubdate).

---
nocite: |
  @*
---
